name: Q-12 --append exits two when a required field (e.g., --latency-ms) is omitted
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/agent-invocations.sh" --append --subagent-id review-types --prompt-id types-reviewer --prompt-version 1.0.0 --model sonnet --tokens-in 100 --tokens-out 50 --exit-code 0 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'latency-ms' err.txt && echo rejected 1>&2
